mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WEB_BOARD WHERE STATUS = 'N'

SELECT BOARD_NO , USER_NAME , BOARD_TITLE , CREATE_DATE , COUNT FROM WEB_BOARD W JOIN WEB_MEMBER USING(USER_NO) WHERE W.STATUS ='N' ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{boardLimit} ROWS ONLY

SELSECT
BOARD_NO
,USER_NAME
,BOARD_TITLE
,BOARD_CONTENT
FROM WEB_BOARD JOIN WEB_MEMBER USING(USER_NO)
WHERE WEB_BOARD.STATUS = 'N'
AND BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}

SELECT BOARD_NO , BOARD_TITLE , WEB_IMAGE_BOARD.CREATE_DATE , FILE_PATH || '/' || CHANGE_NAME "src" FROM WEB_IMAGE_BOARD JOIN WEB_ATTACHMENT ON(BOARD_NO = REF_BNO) WHERE BOARD_TYPE ='I' AND STATUS = 'N' AND FILE_LEVEL = 1 ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC
